title.en: China-to-Australia Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入澳洲：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Australian RCM electrical safety, EESS registration, ACMA EMC, battery, and AS/NZS standards evidence routes.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与澳大利亚 RCM 电气安全、EESS 注册、ACMA 电磁兼容、电池及 AS/NZS 标准证据路径差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與澳洲 RCM 電氣安全、EESS 註冊、ACMA 電磁相容、電池及 AS/NZS 標準證據路徑差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, regulator assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Australian electrical safety law, EESS participation and risk level, ACMA EMC rules, battery obligations, AS/NZS standards use, and state or territory enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、监管机构评估、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行澳大利亚电气安全法律、EESS 参与辖区及风险等级、ACMA 电磁兼容规则、电池义务、AS/NZS 标准使用及州或领地执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、監管機構評估、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行澳洲電氣安全法律、EESS 參與轄區及風險等級、ACMA 電磁相容規則、電池義務、AS/NZS 標準使用及州或領地執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made corded or cordless power tools entering Australia, the mandatory baseline is Australian electrical safety law as applied through EESS/RCM for in-scope equipment, ACMA EMC compliance for regulated electrical products, and battery or charger obligations where applicable; AS/NZS 62841 and related AS/NZS standards are voluntary evidence routes and should not be described as mandatory standards.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入澳大利亚，强制基线是适用设备按 EESS/RCM 落实澳大利亚电气安全法律、受管电气产品满足 ACMA 电磁兼容合规，以及适用时满足电池或充电器义务；AS/NZS 62841 及相关 AS/NZS 标准是自愿证据路径，不应描述为强制标准。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入澳洲，強制基線是適用設備按 EESS/RCM 落實澳洲電氣安全法律、受管電氣產品滿足 ACMA 電磁相容合規，以及適用時滿足電池或充電器義務；AS/NZS 62841 及相關 AS/NZS 標準是自願證據路徑，不應描述為強制標準。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, customs, market-surveillance authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Does a Chinese power tool need RCM marking to be sold in Australia?
q.zh: 中国电动工具在澳大利亚销售是否需要RCM标志？
q.zht: 中國電動工具在澳大利亞銷售是否需要RCM標誌？

a.en: Yes. In-scope power tools are regulated electrical equipment under the EESS framework and require RCM marking demonstrating compliance with AS/NZS 62841 for electrical safety and AS/NZS CISPR 14-1 for EMC. An Australian/New Zealand Responsible Supplier must be registered before supply.
a.zh: 是的。在范围内的电动工具是EESS框架下的受监管电气设备，须加贴RCM标志，证明符合AS/NZS 62841（电气安全）和AS/NZS CISPR 14-1（EMC）。供应前须注册澳大利亚/新西兰责任供应商。
a.zht: 是的。在範圍內的電動工具是EESS框架下的受監管電氣設備，須加貼RCM標誌，證明符合AS/NZS 62841（電氣安全）和AS/NZS CISPR 14-1（EMC）。供應前須注冊澳大利亞/新西蘭責任供應商。

q.en: Do the battery and charger of a cordless power tool need separate compliance in Australia?
q.zh: 澳大利亚无线电动工具的电池和充电器是否需要单独合规？
q.zht: 澳大利亞無線電動工具的電池和充電器是否需要單獨合規？

a.en: Yes. The battery pack and charger are considered separate regulated articles under the EESS framework and must each independently meet the applicable electrical safety and EMC standards, including AS/NZS 62841 and the relevant battery safety standard. They must each carry RCM marking.
a.zh: 是的。电池组和充电器在EESS框架下被视为独立的受监管物品，须各自独立满足适用的电气安全和EMC标准，包括AS/NZS 62841和相关电池安全标准，并各自加贴RCM标志。
a.zht: 是的。電池組和充電器在EESS框架下被視為獨立的受監管物品，須各自獨立滿足適用的電氣安全和EMC標準，包括AS/NZS 62841和相關電池安全標準，並各自加貼RCM標誌。
